name: Banana Cookie Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Fold the mashed bananas and chopped cookies into a large bowl of vanilla ice cream.
2. Pour the mixture into an 8-inch square pan.
3. Drizzle with chocolate syrup.
4. Run a knife through the mix to create swirls.
5. Cover and freeze until firm.
6. To serve, scoop into sundae glasses.
7. Top with additional chocolate sauce, banana slices, and maraschino cherries.
